LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CHRISTINA SHEW'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE COMPLAINT'S SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BATTERY IS OVERRULED. (SEE DMR. NOT. 2:1-3.) THE COMPLAINT ADEQUATELY PLEADS FACTS STATING A BATTERY CLAIM. (SEE, E.G., ID. AT 2:17-4:2, 6:1-20; CACI 1300.) DEFENDANT TAKES A DIFFERENT VIEW OF THE FACTS, BUT THAT IS NOT A DEMURRER'S FUNCTION. (DEL E. WEBB CORP. V. STRUCTURAL MATERIALS CORP. (1981) 123 CAL.APP.3D 593, 604 [PLAINTIFF'S ALLEGATIONS MUST BE ACCEPTED AS TRUE WHEN RULING ON DEMURRER].) PLAINTIFF SUBMITS A PROPOSED ORDER BY EMAIL. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-03-2023 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CHRISTINA SHEW'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE COMPLAINT'S PUNITIVE DAMAGES PRAYER IS DENIED. THE MOTION ERRONEOUSLY ASSUMES THAT ONLY NEGLIGENCE HAS BEEN ADEQUATELY PLED, WHEN BATTERY HAS BEEN PLED TOO. (SEE MEMO. 3:24-25.) MOREOVER, SUFFICIENT CONDUCT WARRANTING PUNITIVE DAMAGES HAS BEEN PLED. (CMPLT. 2:17-4:2, 6:1-20.) PLAINTIFF SUBMITS A PROPOSED ORDER BY EMAIL. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)
OBJECTION HEARING HELD ON MAR-08-2023. JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK VWU; NOT REPORTED. (610)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO COUNT 2 (BATTERY) ONLY. ALL OTHER CAUSES OF ACTIONS TO REMAIN. EACH PARTY TO BEAR FEES AND COSTS. (TRANSACTION ID # 100200613)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-10-2024 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-08-2023 Set For Trial On Feb-20-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2023 Set For Trial On Dec-18-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Mar-08-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Bryan S. Vix Esq. for plaintiff(s) Cristino Castillo Cano; Appearance by Mona L. Bauer Esq. for defendant(s) Christina Yeemun Shew. The jury trial date is continued to 2-20-24 per agreement of parties and there will be no further continuances due to scheduling conflicts. Judge Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk VWU; Not Reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2023 Continued To Mar-08-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-03-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CHRISTINA SHEW's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Defendant's demurrer to the complaint's second cause of action for battery is overruled. (See Dmr. Not. 2:1-3.) The complaint adequately pleads facts stating a battery claim. (See, e.g., id. at 2:17-4:2, 6:1-20; CACI 1300.) Defendant takes a different view of the facts, but that is not a demurrer's function. (Del E. Webb Corp. v. Structural Materials Corp. (1981) 123 Cal.App.3d 593, 604 [plaintiff's allegations must be accepted as true when ruling on demurrer].)

Plaintiff submits a proposed order by email.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-03-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CHRISTINA SHEW's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Defendant's motion to strike the complaint's punitive damages prayer is denied. The motion erroneously assumes that only negligence has been adequately pled, when battery has been pled too. (See Memo. 3:24-25.) Moreover, sufficient conduct warranting punitive damages has been pled. (Cmplt. 2:17-4:2, 6:1-20.)

Plaintiff submits a proposed order by email.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2022 Continued To Jan-25-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-08-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CHRISTINA SHEW'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Chrisina Shew's motion to strike is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 435.5, which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a motion to strike is filed. A declaration must then be filed which specifies whether the meet and confer was in person or by telephone. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and defendant's response to the complaint is now due by December 6, 2022.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-08-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CHRISTINA SHEW'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Chrisina Shew's demurrer is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41, which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer is filed. A declaration must then be filed which specifies whether the meet and confer was in person or by telephone. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and defendant's response to the complaint is now due by December 6, 2022.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
